title: sesleria mollis
intro: Sesleria mollis, also known as Soft Hair-grass, is a species of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, Sesleria mollis has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Sesleria mollis is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically proven.
